summary: A vertical produced montage recapping a year of agency activity, with large burned-in white text on each clip. One shot shows a woman in a dark cap with an agency emblem speaking with people in a facility, captioned 2025 FIRST YEAR OF POTUS. Other shots include an airliner on a runway captioned RECORD WORKFORCE HIRING & RECRUITMENT: Over 50,000 USCIS applicants, and a uniformed officer in camouflage tactical gear holding binoculars captioned CBP Hiring surges 42.5% increase in officers 84% in agents.

script.scene: A woman in an agency cap speaks with people in a facility, captioned 2025 FIRST YEAR OF POTUS.
An airliner on a runway captioned RECORD WORKFORCE HIRING & RECRUITMENT: Over 50,000 USCIS applicants.
A uniformed officer in camouflage gear holding binoculars captioned about CBP hiring increases.

notable_text: 2025 FIRST YEAR OF POTUS; RECORD WORKFORCE HIRING & RECRUITMENT; Over 50,000 USCIS applicants; CBP Hiring surges 42.5% increase in officers 84% in agents
